item.title: #springfieldstrong
item.description: Springfield residents are asking people not to share pet-eating memes and jokes, even ironically. even when you're trying to make fun of the dumb fuckers, it amplifies the wrong message.

item.title: Oopsies, Ouchies, & Oh shits! #2 (Weak Willed be Warned)
item.description:
Oopsies
Ouchies
Oh shit! Recommended Listening: https://youtu.be/qpn_w3EbTjU
FAIR WARNING: If you happen to find that videos #4 and #5 are your limit.
Then please continue on to the next post. Enjoy the rest of your day (:
If you’re still here then safety first! Strap in, strap up, strap on.
Just kidding! Fuck safety (: (I’m just acting tough to impress the other guys. I would never let anything happen to you sugar bear <3)
Weeee
Buh god here comes a crack head with the steel chair!
*monch* *monch* monch*
I sentence you to hornijail
Bailiff, whack his pee pee!
See(4) how dangerous plastic can be!
Me when my posts piss people off.
Tesla drivers eat snickers upside down so they can feel the veins on their tongue.
MFW “Hi there! We’re writing to let you know…”
I love the internet so much I just wanna *bite*
Whack-a-molé
Skies over Germany circa 1943 (colorized)
Meanwhile I crack my neck wrong and I can’t turn left for a day…
“The pranks not that bad bro.” The prank:
Me avoiding suspensions.
Should probably get some ice on that.
Why men live longer than women.
Have a breather. (But stay focused)
This shit stain got off light if you ask me..
How to lose a girl in 10 sec
Can’t park your fire there mate.
NYC isn’t real.
If he was 3ft taller this would’ve ended badly.
ROADHOUSE
POV: you lookin like a snack. (I’m the bear)
It’s literally ALWAYS ego.
HFW I unzip
I finally have a hot body c:
The response was much more organized than I expected.
GTA 6 looks sick.
Messing with the wildlife. It’s a bold strategy cotton, let’s see if it pays off for her.
Never let em know your next move
Fuck around and find out. There are designated targets for a reason.
Omg paparazzi! *pose*
You’re almost there, don’t shoot yourself yet! Final level @ #47
“You get what you fucking deserve!” - Joker
Drop your weapon! *twerks*
Reminds me of the time 3 bullies wanted to jump me in high school. So I brought my sword from saber team practice (: Long story short: they ran.
Me when the gravity is sideways.
I found this one the hardest to watch.
YFW this post
“This is not funny. These people were seriously hur-“

item.description: There is nothing political about this. The Klan is not a political opinion. They are domestic terrorists and that affects everyone's safety. https://x.com/nlanard/status/1835046358488666458
item.dc:creator: telemonianajax

item.title: In the middle of a 6 day work week: stolen memes
item.description:
Never expected to make it this far, sober, but here I am. Infinitely less social, raw dogging reality, straight up not having a good time bro (but also no longer having bathtub hours or coming up with new ways to get cases of vodka to my house)
I identify as a raccoon, not so much the cat like agility and far more the dark circles/will fight for food
My lovely partner all the time, giving me the advice I need and not co-signing my BS, I hate it (I love it)
How it felt the past 666 days
Thankfully never me… I wasn’t a puker when I drank in public, but I did spend the last 2 years drinking at home to avoid this very situation.
Sorry for the absolute lack of pixels
Potatoes are the best.
Didn’t mean to add this one
Slowly fixing my credit, apparently it’s easier to make monthly payments when you are actually aware of time passing
My daily reminder that it wasn’t all bad jokes and drinking games… it was definitely popping off for little to no discernible reason
Definitely my love language, I have meme channels because otherwise my people wouldn’t be able to get through the sheer volume of memes I share on a semi regular basis
Sent to a trumpet player who has daddy issues, gotta help my loved ones when I can
Long distance sucks. It’s wild being in a relationship and going months without any kind of physical touch platonic or otherwise
Best kind
I was okay with mine (march) until I saw the second row
I’m the one with the allergy, but I didn’t figure that out until much later
Thanks for scrolling through my stollen memes! Be kind to yourself, drink some water, and I’m proud of you getting up every day in this batshit crazy world.
item.dc:creator: jesseCandyBaroness

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Painfully dumb customer interactions
item.description:
So this is a collection of stories people have shared online about customers they either saw or dealt with while working.
In this instance it was probably a case of one of those people who tries to talk their way into getting a better deal by claiming they'd get a better deal at the competitor's store. Except in this case the person was an idiot who didn't pay attention to where they were when making their bluff.
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: A bit of light, Sunday blasphemy
item.description:
Never forget
If I had balls, I would have laughed them off. So much here. How fucked up does this person that beleives "..God knew we would need the cross when he created us. He knew when he created us that we would sin. " have to be worship such a monster. "I made you to want to behave in ways that I will send you to eternal torment for acting out on." We have words for sick fucks like that..

item.title: Finally, a Nice Story of Church & Community From Springfield OH ... Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine, a Republican, called the Haitians good, hardworking people who are in the U.S. legally, and said the false rumors are a piece of internet garbage.
item.description: For many Haitian immigrants, Sunday mornings in Springfield, Ohio, are spent joyfully worshipping God as they sing and pray in their native Creole. This Sunday, they needed that uplifting balm more than ever. Their community is reeling — confused, frustrated, hurt — from false accusations that they are eating their neighbor’s cats and dogs. The now viral and highly politicized rumors are being fueled by former President Donald Trump, his running mate JD Vance and others, and violent threats against the community are upending daily life in their city. “Jesus is with us in truth, and the truth is that Haitians are not eating pets and geese in Springfield,” said the Rev. Carl Ruby, preaching at Central Christian Church. He invited community members to join his congregation in prayer and peaceful protest of the false rumors leveled against their Haitian neighbors. Viles Dorsainvil, the leader of Haitian Community Help and Support Center in Springfield, accepted Ruby’s invitation to worship together at Central Christian, and was grateful to be relying on his faith. At Central Christian Church, Ruby encouraged his congregation to help hand out thousands of cards around Springfield that had been printed in Creole and English with a message of support for Haitians. It reads” “I’m glad you are here. Christ loves you and so do I.” As the service ended, Ruby praised parishioners for a beautiful moment amid what he called a storm of chaos. Looking at the Haitian members in the first pew and at the rest of his congregation, he asked them to come together in prayer: “Pray and think what it is to be a Haitian parent sending their child this week to school.” One of those parents is Mia Perez, 35 an immigration lawyer whose 9-year-old daughter had to evacuate her school twice because of bomb threats to a nearby DMV this week. “Kids in school are being asked by other kids: ’How does the dog taste? How does the cat taste?” Perez said, describing her daughter’s distress. “She’s asking, ‘Are we the kind of Haitians who eat this kind of stuff? Is it true? What’s happening?’” “This is a conversation that I was not ready to have with my daughter,” Perez said. “I felt disrespected of our culture.” After the service, some parishioners gathered at Rose Goute Creole restaurant for a traditional Haitian meal of rice and beans, fried plantains and pork. One of them, Jacob Payen, said the restaurant has been transformed in the past week. “We’ve been outnumbered — we have more non-Haitian guests here at the restaurant who are curious to know the culture and Haitian cuisine,” he said. “We feel that they’re sending a strong message: if they’re here eating with us because they trust us.” https://apnews.com/article/springfield-ohio-haitian-immigrants-sunday-church-aa7827f1236f207c9f64ae07096e3977
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.description:
I'd like to think I'm not thaaat close to 40 but the meme still rings true
He's a dang goof
Not a soup recipe but I made some curry and was pleased with how well it turned out. Again, not because I'm nearing 40, these are just my interests
item.dc:creator: biotechonista

item.title: I just got to visit Jasmne in her new forever home!
item.description:
@QuackMagicAndHerMagicalBeer invited me to come see Jasmne and feed me lunch and let me meet all the pets - I even fed her chickens cheerios! Such a fun time.
I’ve missed her little meows!!
Play time in the Jasmne room!! She is loving her new brothers and sisters!! And they love her! But damn do I miss her.
Thank you QuackMagic for inviting me over and letting me see how happy and relaxed she is! And the chicken wraps and homemade potato chips were FIRE!! You best believe I’m going to take you up on your offer to let me come over whenever. You have an amazing family and I’m SO happy to see that Jasmne is fitting in perfectly!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Images of Note: Pondering (aggressively)
item.description:
love the implication that everyone is a turtle.
hecc yes
I spent a good amount of time last night slandering Cloud Services.
I don't think people quite realize that a freight train with unpowered wagons cannot stop like a car can. The amount of people I see on crossings trying to stop even EMUs and DMUs going full tilt by waving their arms is concerning.
too bad US Zoning laws bans you from having anything but a car suburb.
Be like the one on the right, not the one on the left.
TempleOS is fucking wild.
basically
yeah TinTin.
again, me
It's not about babies, it's about controlling women and producing cheap labour of impoverished people.
Yeah that's basically just me around other people
They sell rocking chairs at IKEA btw
This will be a very interesting Episode of Mentor Pilot.
literally the same line of thought of calling your kid "Squire Sebastian Senator".
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
